description: Auto-built YouMod IPA — updated whenever a new YouTube version is available.

apps.name: YouMod
apps.subtitle: YouTube with YouMod tweaks
apps.localizedDescription: YouMod brings back YTLite-style features: ad removal, background playback, UI customisation, and more — without a paywall.

versions.localizedDescription:
YouTube 21.17.3 + YouMod v1.1.0

## Changelog
- Reimplement the settings logics (#29)
- Add gestures controls (#9)
- Adds an option to remove "Includes paid promotion" (#14)
- Adds an option to hide "Suggested video" after video playback ends
- Adds an option to remove Lens button in Shorts
- Adds an option to remove Trends button in Shorts
- Adds a temporary fix for #31
- Try to fix ads not hiding (#15)
- Add Korean translations (#33)
- Add French translations (#35)
